command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup
git pull origin main

echo "=== EXPORT POST-CHANGE WORKFLOW ==="
curl -s -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0YjkyYzA5MS1kMTM3LTRiYmYtODIyMy03ODFhMjZjZGQwODEiLCJpc3MiOiJuOG4iLCJhdWQiOiJwdWJsaWMtYXBpIiwianRpIjoiMDAxZTM0OWYtNjYzMC00OTQyLTljOTQtZGEyZjk4YzlmOGYzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgwNzk5OTExfQ.SRoqA9YJaMud-bhWB1KqGOzat9f8hXDlqe9aHxIMerE" "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows/pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P" -o /tmp/router-9a2.json

cp /tmp/router-9a2.json "baselines/production/router/chatgpt-homelab-agent-router-Phase9A2-AuditLoggingRuntime.json"

echo "=== COMMIT ==="
